title: Mission Majnu
subTitle: An undercover Indian spy takes on a deadly mission to expose a covert nuclear weapons program in the heart of Pakistan that could destroy the free world.

title: Kadvi Hawa
subTitle: A blind old man, worried about the survival and well-being of his son, decides to strike a deal with a debt collector to prevent his child from falling into a debt trap.

title: Raman Raghav 2.0
subTitle: A serial killer stalks a drug-addicted detective investigating the killer's past crimes after noticing eerie similarities.

title: Firaaq
subTitle: In the aftermath of Gujarat's violent 2002 riots, victims find their lives changed forever and reel from the deep impact the upheaval left on them.

title: CityLights
subTitle: Deepak Singh, an ex-army person from Rajasthan, moves to Mumbai with his family hoping for a better lifestyle. However, upon arrival, he realises that everything is not as easy as it seems.

title: Teleshopping
subTitle: The host showcases the features of a variety of products manufactured by renowned brands that can be purchased from the comfort of one's home.

title: Manmarziyaan
subTitle: A young, free-spirited woman is torn between two very different men and must decide who to marry. One is an immature, part-time DJ, while the other is a mature and responsible banker.

title: F.A.L.T.U
subTitle: Four desperate friends, who secure poor grades in their examinations, concoct a fake university when they fail to secure college admissions and face dismal futures.

title: Ghajini
subTitle: Suffering from memory loss every 15 minutes, a heartbroken man uses photographs, notes and tattoos to keep reminding himself to punish his lady-love's murderer.

title: Woh Lamhe
subTitle: Sana, a schizophrenic actress, and Aditya, a filmmaker, fall for each other but her hallucinations put their relationship at stake.

title: The Sabarmati Report
subTitle: Years after the Sabarmati Express tragedy, Samar Kumar teams up with a novice journalist when the latter stumbles upon a suppressed report, leading to a dangerous quest for the truth.

title: Udta Punjab
subTitle: A rock star, a migrant labourer, a doctor and a policeman find themselves struggling to cope with the ensuing chaos surrounding a drug crisis in Punjab, India.

title: Udta Punjab
subTitle: A rock star, a migrant labourer, a doctor and a policeman find themselves struggling to cope with the ensuing chaos surrounding a drug crisis in Punjab, India.

title: Table No. 21
subTitle: While on a fully-paid trip to Fiji, the financially struggling Vivaan and Siya are offered a chance to participate in a game show offering a huge cash prize. As the game progresses, the tasks and questions become increasingly challenging.

title: Trapped
subTitle: Trapped

title: Forensic
subTitle: When a psychotic murderer sets out on a killing spree, Samuel, a medico-legal advisor, uses his forensic skills to unravel the truth behind the heinous deeds.

title: Sapne Suhane Ladakpan Ke
subTitle: In fulfilment of her mother's dying wish, Gunjan, a spirited teenager, is sent to live with her aunt. As she gradually adjusts to her new life, she finds solace in her shy cousin, Rachna.

title: Ek Mahanayak: Dr. B. R. Ambedkar

subTitle: As Santoshi starts working in the house, Raghu warns her discreetly. Poulomi Devi's initial attempt to provoke Santoshi fails, prompting her to disguise herself and confront Santoshi in a different form.
